task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete implementation plan I've developed after thoroughly studying `packages/openai` and `packages/google`:

---

## Plan: Create `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

**11 new files** under `packages/pixelart/` — no existing files modified.

### Package Structure
```
packages/pixelart/
├── package.json             # @ai-sdk/pixelart v0.0.1
├── tsconfig.json            # composite TS project, refs ../provider + ../provider-utils
├── tsconfig.build.json      # composite: false for tsup
├── tsup.config.ts           # CJS + ESM + DTS, injects __PACKAGE_VERSION__
├── turbo.json               # extends root //, dist/** outputs
├── vitest.node.config.js
├── vitest.edge.config.js
└── src/
    ├── index.ts             # public exports
    ├── version.ts           # VERSION constant
    ├── pixelart-error.ts    # Zod v4 error schema + response handler
    ├── pixelart-image-model.ts  # ImageModelV3 + PixelArtImageSettings types
    └── pixelart-provider.ts     # createPixelArt factory + PixelArtProvider interface
```

### Key Design Decisions

| Decision | Detail |
|---|---|
| **API endpoint** | `POST https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate` |
| **Auth** | Bearer token from `options.apiKey` or `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var |
| **`PixelArtImageSettings`** | `style?: 'pixel'\|'retro'\|'8bit'`, `pixelDensity?: number`, `maxImagesPerCall?: number` — set at model-creation time |
| **`PixelArtImageModelId`** | `'pixelart-v1' \| 'pixelart-v2' \| 'retro-8bit' \| (string & {})` |
| **Unsupported features** | `aspectRatio`, `files` (editing), `mask` emit `SharedV3Warning`s |
| **ProviderV3 compliance** | `languageModel()` and `embeddingModel()` throw `NoSuchModelError` |
| **Callable shorthand** | `pa('pixelart-v1')` → `pa.image('pixelart-v1')` |
| **Response format** | API returns `{ images: [{ b64_json: string }] }` |

### Reused from SDK internals
`postJsonToApi`, `combineHeaders`, `createJsonResponseHandler`, `createJsonErrorResponseHandler`, `lazySchema`/`zodSchema`, `loadApiKey`, `withoutTrailingSlash`, `withUserAgentSuffix`, `NoSuchModelError`, `ImageModelV3`, `ProviderV3`
